description: Backend controllers and routes for all 10 Batch 3 features: offline sync, resident tablet, QR room scanning, benchmarking, board pack, staff performance, e-learning, competency sign-off, diabetes management, and palliative care.
steps: Create backend/src/controllers/offlineSync.controller.ts with: queueOfflineAction (POST - stores offline actions), syncOfflineActions (POST - processes queued items, detects conflicts), getConflicts (GET - lists unresolved conflicts), resolveConflict (PATCH :id - resolves a conflict with chosen resolution)

Create backend/src/controllers/residentTablet.controller.ts with: createRequest (POST - resident submits help/meal_rating/activity_choice/video_call/entertainment request), listRequests (GET - list requests with filters), acknowledgeRequest (PATCH :id - staff acknowledges), getResidentView (GET :residentId - simplified data for tablet view)

Create backend/src/controllers/qrRoom.controller.ts with: generateQrCode (POST - creates QR code entry for a resident room), getQrCodes (GET - list all QR codes), scanQrCode (GET :code - returns care plan summary, today's tasks, latest vitals for scanned room), deactivateQrCode (PATCH :id - marks inactive)

Create backend/src/controllers/benchmarking.controller.ts with: getDashboard (GET - returns all KPIs with comparisons), calculateKpis (POST - calculates KPIs from care home data for a period), getMetricHistory (GET :metricName - historical trend for a metric), getNationalAverages (GET - returns reference data)

Create backend/src/controllers/boardPack.controller.ts with: generateBoardPack (POST - auto-generates monthly governance report with KPIs, incidents, staffing, finance, compliance), listBoardPacks (GET - list generated packs), getBoardPack (GET :id - full report detail), approveBoardPack (PATCH :id/approve - marks as approved)

Create backend/src/controllers/staffPerformance.controller.ts with: getTeamMetrics (GET - anonymised team-level performance), getIndividualMetrics (GET :staffId - individual performance for supervision), calculateMetrics (POST - recalculates metrics for a period), getResponseTimes (GET - alert response time analytics)

Create backend/src/controllers/elearning.controller.ts with: listModules (GET), createModule (POST), getModule (GET :id), createQuiz (POST :moduleId/quiz), submitQuizAttempt (POST :moduleId/quiz/submit - scores quiz and issues certificate if passed), getCompletions (GET - staff completion records), getStaffProgress (GET :staffId - individual progress), getMandatoryStatus (GET - mandatory training compliance overview)

Create backend/src/controllers/competencySignoff.controller.ts with: createSignoff (POST - assessor records observation outcome), listSignoffs (GET - with filters), getSignoff (GET :id), updateSignoff (PATCH :id - update or complete sign-off), getStaffSignoffs (GET staff/:staffId - all sign-offs for a staff member)

Create backend/src/controllers/diabetes.controller.ts with: logGlucose (POST), getGlucoseReadings (GET :residentId), logInsulinDose (POST), getInsulinDoses (GET :residentId), recordHba1c (POST), getHba1cHistory (GET :residentId), getAlerts (GET), acknowledgeAlert (PATCH :id), getGlucosePatterns (GET :residentId - pattern analysis for charts)

Create backend/src/controllers/palliativeCare.controller.ts with: createCarePlan (POST), getCarePlan (GET :residentId), updateCarePlan (PATCH :id), scheduleComfortRound (POST), completeComfortRound (PATCH :id), getComfortRounds (GET :residentId), addAnticipatoryMed (POST), getAnticipatoryMeds (GET :residentId), administerAnticipatoryMed (PATCH :id), logFamilyCommunication (POST), getFamilyCommunications (GET :residentId)

Register all new routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts following existing patterns: import controllers at top, add route groups after existing routes. Use appropriate middleware (isStaff for general access, isClinical for clinical features, isManager for admin features). Group routes logically with comment headers.
acceptance_criteria: All 10 new controller files exist in backend/src/controllers/
All routes are registered in backend/src/routes/index.ts with proper authentication middleware
Backend build (cd backend && npm run build) passes with no TypeScript errors
Each controller follows the existing pattern: imports Request/Response/NextFunction from express, uses query() from models/db, uses AppError from utils/errors
